evidence: "This is what Sci Fi is all about, investigating how advancing technology effects us while exploring the human condition."
"Take some of the funny revisionist cheek of the Hercules/Xena franchise... a stunningly shot, empic, dramatic fanstasy series with great moments of comedy to boot."
"I find it a nice, character driven show with real sci fi concepts."
"A solid Sci Fi backbone and a nice level of intrigue and twists to follow and unravel."
"Some folks I know have said it is too slow for them. I find it a nice, character driven show..."
"The story is still topical, with the feel of a cliff notes outline."
"I have loved bones since it first aired..."
"I have loved this show from the first episode."
"It's sad to see this show giving way for some of the more trendy apocalyptic shows that are now airing on Syfy..."
"Gritty, Riveting, Tense. A must see show for anyone who loves to watch characters react to each other and the world around them."
"This woman is brilliant! I needed this. So funny, awkward, human, painful and hopeful..."
"Love it! Gritty, Riveting, Tense. A must see show for anyone who loves to watch characters react to each other and the world around them."

summary: The user has a strong preference for sci-fi and drama genres, appreciating character-driven narratives with high production quality. They enjoy slower pacing and emotional depth in storytelling, often valuing the sensory experience of the shows they watch.
